data.title: INEO Tech Corp. Appoints Paola Valdecañas as Interim CFO
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

INEO Tech Corp. ( (TSE:INEO) ) has issued an announcement.

INEO Tech Corp. has appointed Paola Valdecañas as Interim Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Greg Watkin. Valdecañas, a CPA and CMA with extensive international experience, has been instrumental in strengthening INEO’s financial controls and reporting practices since joining in 2024. Her appointment underscores INEO’s commitment to financial management and governance as it expands globally, and she will play a key role in the search for a permanent CFO.

More about INEO Tech Corp.

INEO Tech Corp., headquartered in Surrey, Canada, operates through its subsidiary, INEO Solutions Inc., providing digital advertising and analytics solutions for retailers via the INEO Media Network, and advertising sales for in-store retail media through INEO Retail Media. The company is publicly traded on the TSX-Venture Exchange and the OTCQB.

Average Trading Volume: 71,518

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$6.91M

For an in-depth examination of INEO stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: National Grid Announces Voting Rights Update and Prospectus Publication
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from National Grid Transco ( (NGG) ) is now available.

On August 1, 2025, National Grid plc announced an update on its voting rights, revealing that as of July 31, 2025, the company had 4,961,230,104 shares with voting rights. This information is significant for shareholders to determine their interests under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. Additionally, on August 8, 2025, National Grid disclosed transactions involving its senior management under the Market Abuse Regulation, highlighting monthly purchases of securities under the Share Incentive Plan. Furthermore, on August 19, 2025, the company published a prospectus for its Euro 20 billion Euro Medium Term Note Programme, approved by the Financial Conduct Authority, which could impact its financial strategy and stakeholder interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (NGG) stock is a Buy with a $79.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on National Grid Transco stock, see the NGG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NGG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NGG is a Outperform.

National Grid’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance and positive earnings call insights, despite technical analysis indicating a neutral trend. The company’s strategic investments and regulatory achievements support a stable outlook, though high capital expenditures and project delays pose risks.

To see Spark’s full report on NGG stock, click here.

More about National Grid Transco

National Grid plc is a prominent company in the energy sector, primarily focusing on electricity and gas transmission and distribution. The company operates in the United Kingdom and the United States, playing a crucial role in maintaining and developing energy infrastructure.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $70.2B

Serco Group plc ( (GB:SRP) ) just unveiled an update.

Serco Group plc announced the purchase of 281,010 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buy-back program, which began on August 7, 2025. This transaction brings the total number of shares purchased under the program to 3,782,869. The company intends to hold these shares in treasury, which may impact shareholder voting rights calculations under the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

The latest announcement is out from Magna Terra Minerals Inc ( (TSE:MTT) ).

Magna Terra Minerals Inc. announced the successful closing of a non-brokered premium flow-through private placement, raising $2 million. The funds will be used to expand exploration programs at the Rocky Brook and Humber projects in Canada, following promising discoveries. The involvement of major shareholder Michael Gentile underscores investor confidence, while the transaction remains compliant with securities regulations.

data.title: Anchor AS Acquires Majority Stake in REC Silicon ASA
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

REC Silicon ASA ( (RNWEF) ) has shared an update.

Anchor AS has made a significant move to acquire a majority stake in REC Silicon ASA by increasing its shareholding to approximately 58.76% following the acceptance of its unconditional mandatory offer. This acquisition marks a pivotal shift in REC Silicon’s ownership structure, potentially impacting its strategic direction and stakeholder interests, as it crosses the 50% threshold for major shareholding disclosure under Norwegian law.

The most recent analyst rating on (RNWEF) stock is a Hold with a NOK8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on REC Silicon ASA stock, see the RNWEF Stock Forecast page.

More about REC Silicon ASA

REC Silicon ASA is a company operating in the renewable energy sector, primarily focusing on the production of silicon materials. These materials are essential for the solar energy industry and various electronic applications. The company aims to strengthen its market position by expanding its shareholding and enhancing its operational capabilities.
